text: Wire auto-tune into the observability and compound learning outcomes. Need to use auto-tune to apply the learning outcomes from observation and compound learning skills.
Change documentation structure to reduce size of ReadMe file. Offload details to other pages. Focus on high value highlights.

New skill template: shipment-reconcile — GI/GR double-entry integrity check for shipment manifests. Provides pre-mode (before backlogit_ship_shipment) and post-mode (after archive+restore) verification. Classifies manifest items as matched/pre-archived/missing/status-mismatch/orphan. Report-and-halt only, never auto-mutates. Proven in agent-engram. Gate on FEATURE_SHIPMENTS. Source: agent-engram/.github/skills/shipment-reconcile/SKILL.md

Ship agent template: add shipment close protocol — Step 0.5.6 (intake reconciliation check with shipment-reconcile mode:pre expected_status:queued) and Step 6.1 (full pre-archive gate, backlogit_ship_shipment call, archive integrity verify via P-007, post-archive reconciliation, commit). Includes file-lock integration. Gate on FEATURE_SHIPMENTS. Use templatized tool vars. Source: agent-engram ship.agent.md Steps 0.5 and 6.

Stage agent template: add scope guard at harvest (Step 5.5.3 sub-step 0) — mandatory first step that records harvest output IDs as harvest_ids and restricts add_to_shipment calls to only those IDs. Prevents over-inclusion of pre-existing queue items into shipments. Discovered after actual incident in agent-engram. Gate on FEATURE_SHIPMENTS. Source: agent-engram stage.agent.md Step 5.5.3.

New policy P-007: Backlogit Archive Integrity After Shipment — post-merge closure gate that detects and repairs the backlogit_ship_shipment file-deletion quirk (tool archives files then deletes archive copies from disk). Required action: git status, git restore .backlogit/archive/, stage, commit. Gate on FEATURE_SHIPMENTS. Add to workflow-policies.md.tmpl with amendment log entry. Source: agent-engram workflow-policies.md.

AGENTS.md template: add shipment-reconcile to Release Unit Pipeline — two conditional lines showing reconciliation at Stage Step 5.5 (scope guard) and Ship Step 6 (GI/GR gate: pre + post). Gate on FEATURE_SHIPMENTS. Source: agent-engram AGENTS.md pipeline section.

Harvest skill template: add 'no shipment creation' guardrail — explicit boundary that shipment creation is a downstream Ship concern, not a harvest responsibility. Separation-of-concerns guardrail. Gate on FEATURE_SHIPMENTS. Source: backlogit harvest/SKILL.md guardrails section.
